questions: What is the name of the technology?
What category does the technology belong to?
What organization(s) or company(ies) developed the technology?
What is the current technology readiness level (TRL) or deployment stage?
How does the carbon capture technology work?
What capture method is used (e.g., post-combustion, pre-combustion, oxy-fuel, direct air capture)?
What is the reported CO₂ capture rate or efficiency (%)?
What is the energy penalty or parasitic load of the capture process?
What is the capital cost (CAPEX) per ton of CO₂ captured?
What is the operating cost (OPEX) per ton of CO₂ captured?
What is the levelized cost of CO₂ capture?
How is captured CO₂ stored, utilized, or transported?
Can the technology be retrofitted to existing cement plants?
Has the technology been deployed commercially at cement facilities?
What are the primary barriers to adoption?
What evidence supports the reported claims?
What information is missing or uncertain?
